description_long: This is a round, single-tier cake with a smooth, light beige base and a thick layer of white icing that drips elegantly over the sides. The top is decorated with evenly spaced dollops of white whipped cream and large, red strawberry-like fruits, creating a festive and appetizing appearance. At the center of the cake, a rectangular chocolate plaque with the words 'Happy Birthday' is prominently displayed. The cake sits on a simple, flat white plate that provides a clean presentation. The overall look is celebratory and inviting, with a classic birthday cake style. The surface appears soft and creamy, with a glossy finish on the icing and a matte look on the cake base.
description: A round, single-tier birthday cake with white drip icing, red fruit decorations, and a 'Happy Birthday' chocolate plaque on top, presented on a white plate.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Happy Birthday' plaque, red fruit decorations, and white whipped cream dollops on top of the cake.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the arrangement of fruit and cream, with the chocolate plaque visible from the side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the chocolate plaque and the symmetrical placement of fruit and cream decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, with the chocolate plaque edge-on and fruit/cream decorations visible.
